reasoning: The PCI DSS control 3.1.1 is focused on ensuring that data is protected through lifecycle management and backup strategies. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring etcd (which stores cluster state and secrets) is properly backed up and encrypted. Additionally, ensuring that secrets are encrypted at rest aligns with data protection requirements. While Kubernetes does not inherently manage application data backups, annotations or labels can be used to ensure that pods have backup strategies documented. Audit log retention ensures that changes can be tracked and are available for compliance verification.
title: Requirement 3.1.1
